inputs.intent: ship the OATH v1 spec to github
inputs.first_action: open the spec doc and write the wedge section

script_result.script:
It is early.
You are in bed.
That is the only fact that matters right now.

Last night, you said you would ship the OATH v1 spec to GitHub this morning.
Not someday. This morning.

Kobe was in the gym at 4am.
Empty building. No cameras. No crowd.
Three hours of shooting before his teammates arrived.
Not because someone watched.
Because the work was the point.

Trust the work.

Open the spec doc.
Write the wedge section.
That is your only job for the next five minutes.
Not the whole spec. Not GitHub. The wedge section.

Sixty minutes. Phone face down.

The spec does not ship from bed.

Sit up.

inputs.intent: ship the OATH v1 spec to github
inputs.first_action: open the spec doc and write the wedge section
